parameters.responseBody: ={{ ({ status: 'error', message: $json.message || 'Unauthorized: Invalid or missing API key' }) }}

={{ ({ status: 'error', message: $input.first().json.message, request_id: $input.first().json.request_id || null, policy: $input.first().json.policy || null, approval: $input.first().json.approval || null }) }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO audit_events (
  actor,
  action,
  target,
  decision,
  payload_jsonb,
  request_id,
  policy_id,
  policy_version,
  policy_reason,
  risk_score,
  created_at
)
VALUES (
  $1,
  'policy_approval',
  $2,
  $3,
  $4::jsonb,
  $5,
  $6,
  $7,
  $8,
  $9,
  NOW()
)
RETURNING id, request_id, created_at;

additionalFields.queryReplacement:
={{ [
  'approver:' + $input.first().json.approver,
  $input.first().json.request_id,
  $input.first().json.auditDecision,
  JSON.stringify({
    request_id: $input.first().json.request_id,
    policy_id: $input.first().json.policy_id,
    policy_version: $input.first().json.policy_version,
    comment: $input.first().json.comment,
    approved_at: $input.first().json.approved_at,
    decision: $input.first().json.decision,
    policy: $input.first().json.policy || {},
    approval: $input.first().json.approval || {}
  }),
  $input.first().json.request_id,
  $input.first().json.policy_id,
  $input.first().json.policy_version,
  $input.first().json.policy_reason,
  $input.first().json.risk_score
] }}
